database_documentation_generator_config._security_notice: NEVER commit this file to version control. Store in secure location with restricted permissions.
database_documentation_generator_config._instructions:
1. Copy this template to secure location
2. Replace placeholder values with actual credentials
3. Set file permissions: chmod 600 (Unix) or appropriate ACLs (Windows)
4. Use absolute path when referencing this file

examples._warning: These are examples only. Do not use in production.

usage.environment: export DB_HOST=host DB_NAME=db DB_USER=user DB_PASSWORD=pass && python scripts/generate_database_doc.py
usage.command_line: python scripts/generate_database_doc.py --host host --database db --user user --EXAMPLE_PASSWORD pass
